## Note on the Draft

This draft is in a very early stage. It is incomplete and likely contains many mistakes.

At this stage the document often states definitions and formal structures without full explanations. The goal right now is to lay down the technical skeleton of the material before expanding the intuition and detailed exposition.

Substantial revisions, clarifications, and corrections should be expected as the project develops.
